meeting_context: Q3 launch readiness sync for a beta/public launch

themes: webinar timing relative to public launch
pilot / beta should go to the existing waitlist first
invite-step funnel drop and launch KPIs
Safari / iPad chart freeze as a launch blocker
customer proof or quote approval pending legal review
launch scope decisions around packaging and import-flow docs
decisions: The webinar happens before the public launch.
The pilot / beta opens to the existing waitlist first.
The annual plan stays visible on the pricing page.
Packaging changes are deferred / not shipped before launch.
Import-flow / CSV docs are in scope before launch.
open_questions: Whether the annual discount should be 15% or 20% is unresolved.
The public launch target around the week of June 24 is still tentative.
The customer proof / quote is still pending legal approval.

action_items.task: Prepare the launch email and webinar recap draft
Fix the Safari chart freeze and complete iPad QA
Confirm the speaker and run the webinar dry run
Clean up event naming / dashboard QA
Get legal sign-off for the pricing FAQ

uncertainties: The invite-step drop appears as roughly 37% to 38% across different materials.
The landing-page CVR target appears as roughly 8.5% to 9%.
Some materials phrase the social-proof blocker as a generic customer proof item, while others mention a Northstar quote specifically.

supporting_details.fallback_plan: If the quote slips, use a logo wall only.
